title: DocsAsMarketingReviewInput
description: Input contract for the docs_as_marketing_review MCP tool. Mirrors the inputs declared in the docs-as-marketing-review skill.

initiative.description: Short label for the initiative or product the document belongs to.

source_url_or_path.description: Caller-supplied locator. May be a URL, a repo-relative path, or any stable identifier the caller can resolve.

document_text.description: Verbatim text of the source. Treated as authoritative; the reviewer must not import facts from outside this field.

output_mode.description: Reserved. The MCP tool currently always returns JSON.
